nodes.text:
(alias) const Fastify: typeof fastify
import Fastify

(alias) function katmanFastify(routerDef: RouterDef, options?: KatmanFastifyOptions): (fastify: any) => Promise<void>
import katmanFastify
nodes.docs:
Create a Fastify plugin from a katman router.

Each procedure is registered as an individual POST route.
Fastify's built-in JSON parsing is used for request bodies.

nodes.text: import appRouter

nodes.docs:
Fastify factory function for the standard fastify http, https, or http2 server instance.

The default function utilizes http
